title: Metered-Counterfactual Cost Ledger Entry
description: Per-work-unit cost record. Persisted by extending roadmap-runtime LearningEntry.vendor_notes; the cumulative (metered_baseline - actual_spend) across entries is the headline arbitrage-value metric.

actual_cost_usd.description: Marginal $ actually incurred. ~0 for subsidised-subscription work until the cap.

metered_counterfactual_usd.description: What this unit would have cost on metered API, from the versioned per-vendor price table.

estimated.description: True when token usage was heuristically estimated rather than reported by the adapter.

pricing_table_version.description: Version of the per-vendor price table used to compute the counterfactual.
